mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_MARKET_ORDER.nextval FROM dual
INSERT INTO market_order ( ORDER_ID, MEMBERNO, USER_ID, TOTAL_PRICE, PAYMENT_METHOD, ORDER_STATUS, RECEIVER_NAME, RECEIVER_TEL, ZIPCODE, ADDRESS1, ADDRESS2, ORDER_DATE ) VALUES ( #{order_id}, #{memberno}, #{user_id}, #{total_price}, #{payment_method}, 'PAID', #{receiver_name}, #{receiver_tel}, #{zipcode}, #{address1}, #{address2}, sysdate )
mapper.select: SELECT o.ORDER_ID, o.MEMBERNO, o.TOTAL_PRICE, o.ORDER_DATE, o.ORDER_STATUS, p.PRODUCT_NAME, i.FILE_NAME, item.PRODUCT_ID, item.ORDER_ITEM_ID, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM market_order_item WHERE ORDER_ID = o.ORDER_ID) as ORDER_COUNT FROM market_order o LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ORDER_ID, PRODUCT_ID, ORDER_ITEM_ID, -- 여기서 가져와야 메인 쿼리에서 쓸 수 있음 ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY ORDER_ID ORDER BY ORDER_ITEM_ID ASC) as rn FROM market_order_item ) item ON o.ORDER_ID = item.ORDER_ID AND item.rn = 1 LEFT JOIN market p ON item.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN product_image i ON p.PRODUCT_ID = i.PRODUCT_ID AND i.IS_MAIN = 'Y' WHERE o.MEMBERNO = #{memberno} ORDER BY o.ORDER_ID DESC

SELECT ORDER_ID, MEMBERNO, USER_ID, TOTAL_PRICE, PAYMENT_METHOD, ORDER_STATUS, RECEIVER_NAME, RECEIVER_TEL, ZIPCODE, ADDRESS1, ADDRESS2, ORDER_DATE, REASON, REASON_DETAIL FROM market_order WHERE ORDER_ID = #{order_id}
SELECT ORDER_ID, MEMBERNO, USER_ID, TOTAL_PRICE, ORDER_DATE, ORDER_STATUS, RECEIVER_NAME, RECEIVER_TEL, REASON FROM market_order ORDER BY ORDER_ID DESC

SELECT m.PRODUCT_ID, m.PRODUCT_NAME, m.PRICE, m.DELIVERY_FEE, #{quantity} as quantity, (m.PRICE * #{quantity}) as total_price, pi.FILE_NAME FROM market m LEFT JOIN product_image pi ON m.PRODUCT_ID = pi.PRODUCT_ID AND pi.IS_MAIN = 'Y' WHERE m.PRODUCT_ID = #{product_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE market_order SET receiver_name = #{receiver_name}, receiver_tel = #{receiver_tel}, zipcode = #{zipcode}, address1 = #{address1}, address2 = #{address2} WHERE order_id = #{order_id}
